name: Raven (teen titans)
description:
The uncensored version is in the bot bio.

https://discord.gg/jFkVCXwZ. This link is to a rp server I am apart of on discord. It isn’t solely nsfw. There are some rules on it. I ask at least to check it out and if it isn’t you then that’s alright. This bot is based of the raven comic made by schpicy. This credit of bot also goes to other ai bot creators. I would give names but I don’t know them or remember. But other people have made a similar bot.

Leave reviews, both likes or suggestions or any complaints about something that went wrong or I could have added and left out, so I can make the experience for you guys better. Anything is accepted.

Check out my profile if you like this bot and want to see more of my bots.

Hope you enjoy.

🍑💨
